name: Standard Email/Password Login
trigger: User submits email + password on LoginPage
happy_path: Router navigates to routeAfterLogin OR dashboard

name: Azure AD / Entra ID Login (MSAL)
trigger: User clicks 'Sign in with Microsoft' button OR silent SSO on load (adLogin flag in localStorage)
happy_path: MSAL handles redirect/popup and emits LOGIN_SUCCESS on MsalBroadcastService
Server validates Entra ID token, maps to ServiceAlert user
localStorage.adLogin='1' → enables silent SSO next load
Same token issuance as standard login
silent_sso_flow: On page load: if localStorage has adLogin flag
On failure: remove adLogin flag, show login form

name: 2FA PIN Verification Flow
steps: Pin sent via SMS (SavePinCode to PhoneNumber+PhoneCode) or email
User enters 6-digit pin in twoFAFormControl
POST /api/user/twofactor { pin, method }
ValidatePinCode() checks pin against saved code (in-memory/cache)
On success: full TokenDto returned, same as standard login
On fail: error shown, user can retry or change method

name: Token Refresh Flow
trigger: AccessToken nearing expiry (15 min TTL) — detected by TokenAuthenticationService interceptor
steps: Angular HTTP interceptor detects token expiry
GET /api/user/refreshaccesstoken?refreshToken=<token>
UserController.RefreshAccessToken() validates DB token
New AccessToken generated, RefreshToken extended (sliding 30 min)
Original request retried with new token
concurrency_risk: Multiple parallel requests near expiry can all trigger refresh simultaneously. Mitigation: SemaphoreSlim(1,1) lock in DelegatingHandler (recommended but verify implementation).

name: Password Reset Flow
trigger: User clicks 'Forgot password' on login page (slideContainerValue → 3)
steps: User enters email in resetPassEmailControl
POST /api/user/passwordresetrequest { email }
Server: generate Guid token, store on User.PasswordResetToken + User.DatePasswordResetTokenExpiresUtc
Email sent with /new-password?token=<guid> link
slideContainerValue → 4 (confirmation shown)
User clicks link, navigates to /new-password
User enters new password
POST /api/user/newpassword { token, newPassword }
Server: validate token + expiry, SetNewPassword() called
New salt + SHA256 hash stored, PasswordResetToken cleared

name: SAML2 SSO Login Flow
trigger: Customer has CustomerSamlSettings configured; user logs in via IdP redirect
steps: IdP-initiated or SP-initiated SAML assertion received
Server validates SAML assertion against CustomerSamlSettings.MetadataUrl
Email extracted from CustomerSamlSettings.EmailClaim attribute
User matched or created (new user → EmailTemplateName.NewSAMLUser email sent)
Same JWT token issuance as standard login

name: ManagedIdentity Service-to-Service Auth
trigger: Inbound API call from Azure-hosted service using Managed Identity token
description: Custom ASP.NET Core AuthenticationHandler. Validates Azure Managed Identity Bearer tokens for internal service-to-service calls. NOT for end-user login.
